ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Amber Enterprises India Limited, through its material subsidiary IL JIN Electronics, has completed the acquisition of an additional 37.50% equity stake in Ascent Circuits Private Limited for approximately Rs. 328 Crore. This transaction significantly increases IL JIN's ownership in Ascent from 60% to 97.50%, ensuring greater control and full consolidation of Ascent's financials, representing a material investment for Amber without any immediate red flags.
